title: No Bath
lyrics:
[verse 1]
*Splash!* The water’s way too hot!
*Crash!* I’ll slip right off the spot!
My duck’s a pirate—he don’t take a bath!
Pirates don’t wash—just look at his path!

[chorus]
No bath! No bath! No bubbles in my hair!
No bath! No bath! I don’t wanna be there!
No bath! No bath! I’ll stay dirty tonight!
No bath! No bath! This is Not right!

[verse 2]
The drain might eat me—*gulp!*—it’s true!
My toes aren’t dinos, but they’re scared too!
Dinosaurs don’t wash, that’s what I know!
So *whoosh!* I’ll run and go, go, go!

[chorus]
No bath! No bath! No bubbles in my hair!
No bath! No bath! I don’t wanna be there!
No bath! No bath! I’ll stay dirty tonight!
No bath! No bath! This is Not right!

[ending]
Fine… but my truck’s coming too!
And the duck’s the king—*argh!*—that’s true!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, banjo and shaker, 124 BPM, strong bass, punchy beat, bouncy groovy infectious singalong, impossible to sit still, makes you move
scene: The bathroom light buzzes overhead at 7:17 PM, steam curling from the tub as Mom kneels with the yellow rubber duck in one hand and says, "Time to wash the dinosaur off your hands." You clutch the soggy towel rack, bare toes curling on the cold tile, and scream, "NO BATH!
cover_description: A wild kid in superhero pajamas stands in a bathtub tsunami, duck-sword raised, bubbles flying everywhere!
